title: Advisor scout-run — warm up 'framework_development' (never run)
perceive: Keep advisor 'framework_development' warm and current — advisors are Ozi's special attention on a specialty. Reason due: never run. Advisor home: WAI-Spoke/advisors/framework_development/. Run its specialty scan and record the run so last_run_at reflects today.
execute: 1. Read WAI-Spoke/advisors/framework_development/context_prompt.md and feeds.yaml to load framework_development's charter, scan scope, and inputs.
2. Perform framework_development's specialty scan as described in its context_prompt; produce concrete, impact-ranked findings.
3. Append findings to WAI-Spoke/advisors/framework_development/findings-log.jsonl (one JSON object per finding).
4. For any actionable finding, write a haiku task lug to WAI-Spoke/lugs/bytype/implementation/open/ (model_fit=haiku, initiative=crew-maintenance).
5. Set last_run_at=2026-06-12T11:49:02.073463Z in WAI-Spoke/advisors/schedule-index.json (entry advisor_id=framework_development) AND WAI-Spoke/advisors/framework_development/scan_state.json.
verify: schedule-index.json and WAI-Spoke/advisors/framework_development/scan_state.json both show last_run_at=today for 'framework_development'; any findings were appended to findings-log.jsonl.
